message.content:
@startuml
participant "Customer" as C
participant "Frontend" as F
participant "Backend" as B
participant "Database" as DB

section "Make Event"
    C -> F: Presses the "Make new Event"-button
    F -> B: Request to open new window
    B -> F: Opens new window
    F -> C: Enters event information
    F -> B: Presses "Create"-button
    B -> F: Request to validate input

    alt [Successful case]
        B -> B: Validation successful
        B -> DB: Adds event to database
        DB -> B: Adds event to list
        B -> F: Closes window
        F -> B: Selects newly added event from list
        B -> F: Displays eventinformation to user
        F -> C: Displays eventinformation to user
    endalt

    [Validation failed]
        B -> B: Validation failed
        B x
        B -> F: Displays alert of type ERROR
        F -> C: Lists up fields with errors
        F -> B: Closes alertbox

section "Cancel"
    C -> F: Presses the "Cancel"-button
    F -> B: Request to close process
    B -> B: Deletes event-object
    B -> F: Closes window
    F -> B: Selects first event in list
    F -> C: Displays list of events
@enduml
